mapper.select: SELECT 'hseKeyPerformanceResults' AS title ,'/HseKeyPerformanceResults' AS route ,'hseKeyPerformanceResultsDesc' AS description , case when hseKeyPerformanceResults.exist then 'Y' else 'N' end as activeYn FROM ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives tsho WHERE tsho.comp_id = #{compId} AND tsho.write_year = #{writeYear} ) as exist ) AS hseKeyPerformanceResults

SELECT A.comp_id , A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.orgn_id , (select Z.orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info Z where Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , A.revised_dt , A.enacted_dt , COUNT(DISTINCT B.doc_seq) AS doc_count , COUNT(CASE WHEN F.use_yn = 'Y' THEN F.doc_seq END) AS res_count , SUM(CASE WHEN F.use_yn = 'Y' THEN F.percent::integer ELSE 0 END) AS progress_sum , A.use_yn , esg.fn_getapprovalstatus('KPR', A.write_year || A.doc_no) AS approval_status FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail B ON B.doc_type = A.doc_type AND B.doc_no = A.doc_no AND B.orgn_id = A.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result F ON B.doc_no = F.doc_no AND B.write_year = F.write_year AND B.doc_seq = F.doc_seq WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.use_yn = 'Y' and B.use_yn='Y' GROUP BY A.comp_id, A.write_year, A.doc_type, A.doc_no, A.orgn_id ORDER BY A.write_year DESC, A.doc_no DESC;

SELECT A.orgn_id , A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.doc_seq , A.safety_health_goal , A.detail_goal_method , A.hr_id , (select Z.hr_nm from esg.tb_hr_info Z where Z.hr_id = A.hr_id ) AS hr_nm , (select Z.orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info Z where Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , B.revised_dt , B.enacted_dt , A.required_resource , A.evaluation_method , A.remark , A.use_yn , action_doc_type , action_doc_no , action_doc_seq , action_doc_detail_seq , A.action_schedule1 , A.action_schedule2 , A.action_schedule3 , A.action_schedule4 , A.action_schedule5 , A.action_schedule6 , A.action_schedule7 , A.action_schedule8 , A.action_schedule9 , A.action_schedule10 , A.action_schedule11 , A.action_schedule12 , taco.company_objective , taop.action_objective , tadp.detail_plan , tadi.detail_item , tadp.detail_item_id FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives B ON A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan taop ON A.write_year = taop.write_year AND A.action_doc_type = taop.doc_type AND A.action_doc_no = taop.doc_no AND A.action_doc_seq = taop.doc_seq AND A.comp_id = taop.comp_id LEFT join esg.tb_action_company_objective taco ON taco.comp_objective_id = taop.comp_objective_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan tadp ON A.write_year = tadp.write_year AND A.action_doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND A.action_doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND A.action_doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq AND A.action_doc_detail_seq = tadp.doc_detail_seq AND A.comp_id = tadp.comp_id AND taop.doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_item tadi ON tadi.detail_item_id = tadp.detail_item_id WHERE A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.write_year = #{writeYear} ORDER BY A.doc_seq DESC, A.use_yn = 'N' ASC;

select tkpr.*, thi.hr_nm from esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result tkpr LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi on tkpr.hr_id = thi.hr_id where tkpr.doc_seq = #{docSeq} and tkpr.doc_no = #{docNo} order by tkpr.doc_seq_detail ASC
mapper.update: update esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result SET hr_id = #{hrId}, check_dt = #{checkDt}, percent = #{percent}, content = #{content}, action_result1= #{actionResult1}, action_result2= #{actionResult2}, action_result3= #{actionResult3}, action_result4= #{actionResult4}, action_result5= #{actionResult5}, action_result6= #{actionResult6}, action_result7= #{actionResult7}, action_result8= #{actionResult8}, action_result9= #{actionResult9}, action_result10= #{actionResult10}, action_result11= #{actionResult11}, action_result12= #{actionResult12}, use_yn= #{ useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE doc_no = #{docNo} AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND doc_seq_detail = #{docSeqDetail};
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq_detail, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeqDetail FROM esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, doc_seq_detail, hr_id, check_dt, percent, content, action_result1, action_result2, action_result3, action_result4, action_result5, action_result6, action_result7, action_result8, action_result9, action_result10, action_result11, action_result12, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{docSeqDetail}, #{hrId}, #{checkDt}, #{percent}, #{content}, #{actionResult1}, #{actionResult2}, #{actionResult3}, #{actionResult4}, #{actionResult5}, #{actionResult6}, #{actionResult7}, #{actionResult8}, #{actionResult9}, #{actionResult10}, #{actionResult11}, #{actionResult12}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.orgn_id , A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.doc_seq , A.safety_health_goal , A.detail_goal_method , A.hr_id , (select Z.hr_nm from esg.tb_hr_info Z where Z.hr_id = A.hr_id ) AS hr_nm , (select Z.orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info Z where Z.orgn_id = A.orgn_id ) AS orgn_nm , B.revised_dt , B.enacted_dt , A.required_resource , A.evaluation_method , A.remark , A.use_yn FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives B ON A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no WHERE A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.orgn_id = #{orgnId} AND A.doc_seq = #{docSeq} ORDER BY A.doc_seq DESC, A.use_yn = 'N' ASC;
select t1.write_year , t1.comp_id , t1.doc_type , t1.doc_no , t1.orgn_id from esg.tb_safety_health_objectives t1 where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT tmd.* FROM esg.tb_task_manager tm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_task_manager_detail tmd ON tm.comp_id = tmd.comp_id AND tm.user_id = tmd.user_id AND tm.task_year = tmd.task_year AND tm.task_month = tmd.task_month AND tm.task_day = tmd.task_day AND tm.task_seq = tmd.task_seq WHERE tmd.req_info_key = #{reqInfoKey} AND tmd.task_detail_div = #{taskDetailDiv} AND tmd.cancel_dt is null AND tmd.complete_dt is null
